steps.expected: CASH token detail route renders with CASH price and chart
steps.observed: Route rendered CASH header (CASH/CASH), price ($0.1000/$0.0932), and green price chart

steps.expected: Stats and trades show CASH market data or documented empty state
steps.observed: Stats rendered (1 day volume $142.35K, 52W high/low, price) and transactions table populated with buy/sell trades

steps.action: Check network requests and API endpoints
steps.expected: TDP data sourced from local API
steps.observed: Browser requested /cash-api/market, /cash-api/candles, /cash-api/trades; direct readonly checks to localhost:3100 returned 200 for /market, /candles?interval=5m, /trades?limit=50

evidence.network: GET /cash-api/market, /cash-api/candles?interval=5m, /cash-api/trades?limit=50 observed in browser; curl http://localhost:3100/market -> 200, /candles?interval=5m -> 200, /trades?limit=50 -> 200

steps.action: Read document title on CASH route
Inspect visible branding text on page
steps.expected: Visible branding is CASH, not Uniswap
steps.observed: Visible page content shows CASH labels (Tokens › CASH, CASH/CASH, About CASH) and body text check returned hasUniswap=false
Connect button computed background was rgb(0, 213, 75) (#00D54B); chart line also rendered in green

evidence.network: Branding assertion does not require additional API calls beyond page render

frictions.description: Route ambiguity: /explore/tokens/aptos/CASH redirected to /explore and showed a 'Token not found' modal. CASH data-layer TDP is implemented at /cash.
frictions.resolution: Validated assertions on the implemented CASH-specific route /cash and captured evidence there.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. CASH data-layer TDP and CASH branding requirements were satisfied on /cash.
